name: summit
description: Discord Bot for weekly Momotetsu attendance automation

scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec tsx watch src/index.ts'
scripts.start: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec node dist/index.js'
scripts.test:integration: INTEGRATION_DB=1 dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts'
scripts.ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm verify:forbidden && pnpm verify:file-size
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec tsx scripts/dev/seed.ts'
scripts.dev:scenario: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec tsx scripts/dev/scenario.ts'
scripts.commands:sync: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'SUMMIT_CONFIG_YAML="$(cat summit.config.yml)" exec tsx src/commands/sync.ts'
scripts.setup: cd ../momo-db && pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && cd ../summit && pnpm install && pnpm db:seed
